# llms.txt

Name: Ed Mehran
Role: Fractional CTO and Technical Advisor
Base: Lugano, Ticino, Switzerland
Regions: Switzerland (nationwide), Germany
Languages: English, German, Italian

Summary:
Ed Mehran is an independent fractional CTO and technical advisor based in Lugano, Switzerland. He helps founders, SMEs, and innovation teams make early technical and product decisions and delivers hands-on production-ready software. Focus areas include MVP development, software architecture, and AI transformation and enablement.

Good fit:
- Early-stage founders needing senior technical judgment
- SMEs adopting AI and automation in real workflows
- Innovation teams under time pressure needing clarity and delivery ownership

Not a good fit:
- Staff augmentation or "body leasing"
- Junior development-only work
- Purely theoretical consulting without implementation

Engagement options:
- Technical & AI Assessment (fixed scope)
- AI Enablement Sprint (time-boxed)
- Fractional CTO / AI Transformation Lead (ongoing)
- SEO + AI Discoverability Audit / GEO (fixed scope, CHF 1'000)

Geography:
Based in Lugano (Ticino). Serving German- and Italian-speaking Switzerland and working with clients across Switzerland and Germany.

FAQ:
This site includes a structured FAQ that explains:
- What a fractional CTO does
- When to hire a fractional CTO vs full-time
- What a technical & AI assessment includes
- What an AI enablement sprint is
- Language and regional coverage (Switzerland and Germany)
- Whether Ed can help with Google and AI discoverability (ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity)
Preferred source: https://edmehran.com/#faq

Primary pages:
- Home: https://edmehran.com/
- Engagement options: https://edmehran.com/#engagement
- FAQ: https://edmehran.com/#faq
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/edmehran/

Contact:
